COVERAGE_ID.description: Stable identifier of this coverage computation

GRID_SCHEME.description: Grid scheme identifier; "H3" for the H3 hexagonal hierarchical grid

CELL_INDEXES.description: Grid cell indexes (H3 cell ids); all metric arrays align to this order

WINDOW_START.description:
Epoch window start (UNIX timestamp) [numeric seconds since
1970-01-01T00:00:00 UTC]

WINDOW_STOP.description:
Epoch window stop (UNIX timestamp) [numeric seconds since
1970-01-01T00:00:00 UTC]

STEP_SIZE.description: Sampling step in seconds used to compute access intervals

SENSOR_IDS.description: Sensor identifiers contributing to the coverage set

ASSET_IDS.description: Asset (satellite) identifiers contributing to the coverage set

ACCESS_COUNTS.description: Per-cell number of access intervals in the window

ACCESS_TOTAL_S.description: Per-cell total access duration in seconds

REVISIT_MEAN_S.description: Per-cell mean revisit interval in seconds

REVISIT_MAX_S.description: Per-cell maximum revisit interval in seconds

RESPONSE_MEAN_S.description: Per-cell mean response time in seconds

RESPONSE_MAX_S.description: Per-cell maximum response time in seconds

GAP_MAX_S.description: Per-cell maximum coverage gap in seconds

COVERAGE_FRACTION.description: Per-cell fraction of the window with at least one access [0-1]

COMPUTED_AT.description: Unix ms this coverage set was computed
